title: Administration
description: The Administration section provides platform administrators with centralized tools to manage users, roles, authentication providers, system configuration, and operational health. From here you can onboard new users, assign permissions, configure external identity providers, monitor system status, and maintain the vocabulary and WebAPI registry.
tips: Use the Roles & Permissions screen to apply least-privilege access — assign users only the roles required for their research workflows.
Review the Audit Log regularly to track sensitive operations such as cohort exports and user permission changes.
Configure AI Providers and Abby AI settings before enabling the AI assistant for end users so that API keys and rate limits are set correctly.
Check System Health after any platform upgrade to confirm that all background services and WebAPI endpoints are responding normally.
Solr Administration controls full-text search indexing — reindex after bulk vocabulary updates to keep concept search results accurate.
